title: Amaranthium (Magic: Conjuration)
description: Adds simple summoning-themed item effects when holding 'Conjuration Powder' in your offhand and using certain Items as the Second of three Official Magic DLC-like content sequels for the Amaranthium Series.
body:
Amaranthium (Magic: Conjuration) is the second of three Magic-themed DLC-like content sequels for the Amaranthium series, adding items such as Conjuration Powder, obtainable by stonecutting Sapphire, an ore that spawns between Y1 and Y46, and requires an Iron Pickaxe to mine. Using JEI or REI is realy helpful as always.
This summoning/conjuring themed mod adds a few compatabilities with 'Conjuration Powder' including the following:
1. Sapphire Sword: when poisoned, right-clicking with Conjuration Powder in your offhand will summon a bunch of Spiders.
2. Sapphire Sword: when Hungry, right-clicking with Conjuration Powder in your offhand will summon a bunch of Zombies.
3. Sapphire Sword: when Nausiated, right-clicking  with Conjuration Powder in your offhand will summon a bunch of Skeletons.
4. Sapphire Spear: when holding Conjuration Powder in your offhand, right-clicking shoots a butt-load of arrows...
5. The Lightning Rod: when holding Conjuration Powder in your offhand, shoot a projectile that Conjures lightning on your foes.
6. Sapphire Dancing Blade: when holding Conjuration Powder in your offhand, right-clicking gives you haste.



Anyone who wants to make an addon for this mod can if they wish.
